description: Comprehensive Loki admin dashboard for error analysis, rejection tracking, rate limiting, and operational health. Breaks down errors by HTTP status code, route, and cluster.

panels.description: Percentage of all requests returning 4xx or 5xx status codes. A rising error rate signals degraded service health.
panels.title: Total Error Rate %

panels.description: Rate of server-side errors (HTTP 5xx). These indicate bugs, resource exhaustion, or infrastructure failures within Loki.
panels.title: 5xx Errors/sec

panels.description: Rate of client-side errors (HTTP 4xx). Includes bad requests (400), unauthorized (401), forbidden (403), not found (404), and rate limited (429).
panels.title: 4xx Errors/sec

panels.description: Total request throughput across all Loki routes, clusters, and namespaces. Baseline for understanding error ratios.
panels.title: Total Request Rate

panels.description: Percentage of requests returning HTTP 2xx. This is the inverse of the error rate and reflects overall service availability.
panels.title: Success Rate %

panels.description: 95th percentile latency across all Loki request routes. High P95 indicates slow outlier requests impacting user experience.
panels.title: P95 Latency

panels.description: All 4xx and 5xx errors broken down by exact HTTP status code. Identifies the specific error types occurring.
panels.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code

panels.description: Error rate percentage over time for 4xx and 5xx categories separately. The 1% threshold line represents a common SLO boundary.
panels.title: Error Rate % Over Time

panels.description: Routes producing the most server errors. Focus reliability fixes here.
panels.title: Top 10 Routes with Most 5xx Errors

panels.description: Routes with most client errors. 429s indicate rate limiting, 400s indicate bad requests.
panels.title: Top 10 Routes with Most 4xx Errors

panels.description: 5xx error rate as a percentage of total requests per cluster. Identifies which cluster is experiencing the most server errors.
panels.title: 5xx Error Rate by Cluster

panels.description: Total request throughput per cluster. Correlate with error rates to identify overloaded clusters.
panels.title: Request Rate by Cluster

panels.description: Discarded samples by reason: rate_limited, per_stream_rate_limit, stream_limit, etc.
panels.title: Discarded Log Lines

panels.description: Requests rejected with HTTP 429. Indicates tenants hitting ingestion limits.
panels.title: Rate Limited Requests (429)

panels.description: Comparison of received vs discarded. Large discarded volume indicates misconfigured pipelines.
panels.title: Validation Failures

panels.description: Top 15 routes ranked by total request volume. Identifies the busiest API endpoints in your Loki deployment.
panels.title: Top 15 Routes by Request Volume

panels.description: Request rate per route over time. Stacked view shows relative contribution of each route to total traffic.
panels.title: Request Rate by Route Over Time

panels.description: Top 10 slowest routes by P95 latency. Focus optimization efforts on the highest-latency endpoints.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"$route"}[$__rate_interval]))))

panels.title: P95 Latency by Route

panels.description: Latency percentile distribution across all routes. P50 is the median, P99 captures worst-case tail latency.
panels.title: Latency Percentiles -- All Routes

panels.description: Error rate percentage for distributor push routes. High error rate here means log ingestion is failing.
panels.title: Distributor Error Rate

panels.description: 5xx errors from ingester-related routes. Ingester failures cause data loss and write path degradation.
panels.title: Ingester Error Rate

panels.description: Errors from query frontend routes including query, tail, series, and label endpoints. High errors here degrade read path experience.
panels.title: Query Frontend Error Rate

title: Loki Admin — Errors, Rejections & Operations
